source_access.notes: Reviewer had partial access and preserved the limitation rather than claiming full review or recomputation.

claims.asserted_meaning: Partial access was recorded as an access limitation. No content review, execution, recomputation, approval, compliance, legal sufficiency, or truth conclusion is claimed.

interpretation.permitted_use: May be cited only as evidence that partial access was encountered and preserved as unresolved access state.
interpretation.prohibited_use: Must not be cited as content review, structural reproduction, endorsement, approval, compliance, legal sufficiency, truth, or production readiness.
